text: TinyML enables on-device ML inference on microcontrollers with <1mW power, using model compression techniques like quantization, pruning, and knowledge distillation to fit models in KB of memory.
MobileNets (Howard et al. 2017, Google) introduced depthwise separable convolutions, achieving comparable accuracy to standard CNNs with 8-9× fewer parameters, enabling vision AI on mobile devices.

Federated Learning (McMahan et al. 2017, Google) trains models across decentralized edge devices without centralizing raw data, addressing both privacy and bandwidth constraints in edge AI deployments.
